newsletters.author: Simon Willison (@simonw)
newsletters.reasoning: Simon Willison newsletter covering: (1) convergence of vibe coding and agentic engineering paradigms, (2) live blog of Code w/ Claude 2026 conference, (3) xAI/Anthropic data center deal. All core AI/LLM agent topics. Simon Willison is already a tracked entity in the wiki.
newsletters.extracted_content_sample: Key insight: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are converging. As coding agents get more reliable, even experienced engineers stop reviewing every line of code. Simon questions the responsibility of using AI-generated code in production without full review.
